title: Sour Dense Malaysian Pork Crumble
description: A kid-friendly and dairy-free version of the sour dense pork crumble from Malaysia, perfect for a quick snack or breakfast.

ingredients.name: vinegar
ingredients.notes: use apple cider or white vinegar for a milder taste

ingredients.name: ginger root
ingredients.notes: grated fresh ginger, can be substituted with 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger if no fresh is available

ingredients.name: sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: optional garnish for texture and color

instructions: Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl until well combined.
Shape the mixture into small, bite-sized crumbles using your hands or spoon.
Arrange the crumbles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Garnish with sesame seeds if desired, then serve.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
